name: ABDL Regression Virus
description:
A virus is sweeping the world. The infected seem to be mentally regressing as the virus takes hold. They become confused, and uncoordinated. Eventually, they lose control of their bladders, and eventually their bowels as well. The longer the infection goes untreated, the further their condition will worsen, until they are completely helpless, diaper dependant adult babies.

You can do whatever you choose to do as the virus begins to spread.

Credit for pic: PaddedRex on deviantart
creator: Triple X Mango
